entries.title: Threat model pass
entries.content: Primary risks are accidental secret persistence, raw payload retention, and unclear local export ownership.

entries.title: Redact before writing
entries.content: Exporter must redact secrets before any local file write. Raw request payloads should stay in memory only for the duration of the explicit export action.

entries.title: Review completed
entries.content: Security summary written and linked. No open follow-up actions remain for this stream.
